effect: Gatotkaca performs a heavy strike, launching an Enhanced Basic ATK that restores 400 HP and deals (+400%Total Magic ATK) Magic DMG.
Lylia summons Gloom to charge forward, dealing (+720%Total Magic ATK) Magic DMG to enemies along the path. (DMG decreases for each enemy penetrated.)

Passive: When battle starts, Brody grants 10% ATK Speed to himself and allies within 1 tile to his left and right. His Basic ATK causes enemies to take (+20%Total Physical ATK) extra Physical DMG from his subsequent Basic ATKs for 4s. Max Stacks: 5.

Pharsa floats into mid-air. Over the next 4s, she launches up to 4 bombardments prioritizing the location with the most enemies, each dealing (+370%Total Magic ATK) Magic DMG to enemies in range. (DMG decreases with the number of enemies hit.)

Fredrinn thrusts his sword forward, dealing (+280%Total Physical ATK) Physical DMG (DMG decreases with the number of enemies hit) and gaining a Shield equal to 10% of his Max HP for 4s. Fredrinn also enhances the next Basic ATK, increasing its range and dealing (+420%Total Physical ATK) Physical DMG.

Joy moves to the tile with the most nearby enemies, dealing (+75%Total Magic ATK) Magic DMG 8 time(s) to enemies on adjacent tiles and gaining Control Immunity. Enemies hit also have 24 Hybrid DEF reduced for 4s (this effect cannot stack).

Bane summons a swarm of sharks to sprint forward, dealing (+240%Total Magic ATK) Magic DMG to enemies hit, knocking them airborne and freezing them for 1.2s. Passive: At 3-Star, the number of summoned sharks is greatly increased.

Luo Yi summons Energy of Yin, immediately dealing (+275%Total Magic ATK) AoE Magic DMG and stunning enemies for 0.5s. She then applies Energy of Yang, dealing (+135%Total Magic ATK) Magic DMG 3 time(s) to enemies around the target position. (DMG decreases with the number of enemies hit.) Each time Energy of Yin disappears, gain 10% Skill DMG Increase, up...
notes: Second Magic Bonus row (Energy of Yang): 135%/140%/200%; effect text is cut off at the bottom of the screenshot after 'up'
